Within the class Dothideomycetes, Pasaniopsis cuspidata is placed in the order Capnodiales, which consists of fungi that typically grow on plants and other organic matter. The family to which Pasaniopsis cuspidata belongs is the Capnodiaceae, a diverse group of fungi that exhibit various forms of growth and reproduction. Further classification of Pasaniopsis cuspidata into a specific genus and species within the Capnodiaceae family is also necessary for a complete understanding of its classification.
